channel.title: The Modern CRM Stack on The SaaS Education
channel.description: Recent content in The Modern CRM Stack on The SaaS Education

item.title: How to Choose a CRM Your Team Will Actually Use
item.description: A CRM succeeds when it makes useful work easier. Start with the workflows your team repeats every day, then evaluate software around those moments.

item.title: Sales Intelligence Is Useful Only When It Changes the Next Action
item.description: More sales data is not automatically more useful. The best intelligence tools turn signals into clear, timely next steps for the people doing the work.
